feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to use Reference material for Automatic packing, What are the config steps and Master data setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts

 My client want to use the reference material functionality for automatic packing. Appreciate, if you can provide the inputs on the config and master data setup.

entry.title: Issue with Updating Records in MS Dynamics CRM via SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
I am currently utilizing the MS Dynamics CRM adapter included with the SAP Integration Suite provided by Rojo Consulting. The scenario involves extracting account credit data from the SAP system and transmitting it to the MS Dynamics CRM di_creditlimit entity. This process should either create new records or update existing records based on primary key fields (di_limitype and di_customernumber).

 

While I have successfully managed to create records in Dynamics, I am encountering an issue with updating records. Specifically, when the primary keys already exist in the system, any changes to other fields are not being updated as expected.

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation
entry.content:
i, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: Feature Request: Allow descriptions for global Process Intelligence filters
entry.content:
Hi,

we would like to address the following feature request:

As an Analyst I would like to add a description to my global filters within my SAP Signavio Process Intelligence dashboard, so that I can provide the Consumers more easily with the information as of why certain default filters have been set in a certain way and how they can be adapted to achieve other analysis results.

BR, Anna

entry.title: Issue Updating Records in MS Dynamics CRM through SAP Integration Suite using ROJO Dynamics adapter.
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are currently utilizing the MS Dynamics CRM adapter included with the SAP Integration Suite provided by Rojo Consulting. The scenario involves extracting account credit data from the SAP system and transmitting it to the MS Dynamics CRM creditlimit entity. This process should either create new records or update existing records based on primary key fields (limitype and customernumber).

While we have successfully managed to create records in Dynamics,  we are encountering an issue with updating records. Specifically, when the primary keys already exist in the system, any changes to other fields are not being updated as expected.

Steps Taken:

Developed an iFlow for data transmission.

Configured a message mapping to transform data and handle lookup fields.

Verified that all fields are correctly mapped and identified in the Dynamics system.

Issue:

Records are created successfully when the primary keys do not exist.

Updates are not performed when the primary keys already exist in the system, even if other field values have changed.

Error Message :

A record that has the attribute values Customer Number, Limit Type already exists. The entity key Credit Limit Key requires that this set of attributes contains unique values. Select unique values and try again.

Has anyone experienced similar issues with updates not being performed in MS Dynamics CRM using SAP Integration Suite? What steps can we take to ensure that updates are processed correctly?

entry.title: CDS view for material cost history
entry.content:
We need a CDS view that can provide material cost history. We are on SAP S/5 HANA Cloud 2402. The table MBEWH provides the required information but it cannot be used in a CDS view.

Any suggestions?

Jayshree

entry.title: How to remove __metadata from json deep structure payload in CPI?
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest how I remove the metadata tag from my JSON deep structure payload using groovy script.

entry.title: migrate data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public), suggestion?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
Is there any possible way to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public)? Could you please suggest the possible methods?

entry.title: List of blogs by a specific author
entry.content: Dear Team, I would like to know if you could kindly tell me if there is an admin function to download an Excel sheet listing all blogs from a specific author. I would need the blog name, link to the blog, and the date of blog - those would be my three parameters. Many thanks in advance for your support! Warm regards, Jennifer

entry.title: Global Information - EC Report
entry.content:
hi,

Can I check how we could pull a report for the country field in Global Information?

entry.title: Role & responsibilities of MM consultant in computer manufacturing company like dell,HP,lenevo
entry.content:
Hi all,

Need your help to understand the roles and daily activities performed by MM consultant in a supply chain industry like dell or hp or any manufacturing industry?

I am new to SAP (learner) so i need some understanding the course related to the job role. Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Is it possible to set Contractual User Type ID while provisioning users from IAS?
entry.content: We are trying to set Contractual User Type ID field while provisioning users from IAS. Is it possible? We could not manage to find any properties for this field in target system configuration.

entry.title: fixed asset
entry.content:
The current fiscal year that is entered in company code 1000 does not agree with the current fiscal year entered in asset 1000 200000006-0 .

 

Getting this error during asset retirement f-92

entry.title: 3383785 - Prerequisite Objects for Enable NFCom (Electronic Nota Fiscal for Telecommunication Servic
entry.content:
Subject: Error in implementation of SAP NOTE 3383785 - Prerequisite Objects for Enable NFCom (Electronic Nota Fiscal for Telecommunication Services) - Model 62

Hello

I am implementing the Electronic Nota Fiscal for Telecommunication Services) - Model 62 and the SAP Note 3383785 has a manual step to execute the report  NOTE_3383785. After the execution there is only one error

DOMA         J_1BMODEL                  aCI DDIC missing or not yet implemented

Could you please advise how can I fix it and go ahead with the this implementation?

Thank you in advance

João Gaia

#NOTE_3383785

#3383785 - Prerequisite Objects for Enable NFCom (Electronic Nota Fiscal for Telecommunication Services) - Model 6

#Model 62

entry.title: How to print Rebate Credit Memo with settlement document type in S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
I have created a settlement document type for a Customer. The rebate credit memo amount is also created properly. Now, I need to print the rebate credit memo and send it to the customer. How to achieve it?

 

DRS

entry.title: How to pass header and line item xml body to the CPI Endpoint?
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, how to manage the header and multiple line item data dynamically in SAP CPI.

entry.title: Wrongly Fectching Business area In F-58
entry.content:
When posting F-58, BUSINESS AREA FOR TDS-CGST & TDS-SGST is getting altered. During the simulation the business area are retrived correctly, but upon posting, they change automatically.

Procedure- We created PO, followed by payment request (F-47) with BUSINESS AREA 14. The payment (F-58) was made with business area 81 because payment is handled by the head office, while the request was created by division. We have entered TDS at the time of Payment Request.

Below are screen shot attached for reference 

At time of simulation 

 

After posting 

 

Please suggest Solution.

entry.title: Difference between Gl balances and asset history AR02
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While extracting FAR register from AR02 & than comparing its depreciation for the year balance with GL`s

6 Million difference is coming. While thoroughly checking just discovered that some asset`s depreciation balance is occurring more in FAR and less in GL ? Please suggest the way forward.

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: External cash desk - CashPointPaymentCreateNotification_In
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using external cash desk for posting collection from customers through middleware. We are using  "CashPointPaymentCreateNotification_In" service for posting collection. The service is asynchronous and hence it gets collection posted however, we are not getting response against it. 

Do we have any option to make it synchronous instead of asynchronous service so that we can provide response with reference to the collection received through middelware.

Please let me know is there any option.

Regards,

Narendra
